## Analyzers (1)

### [HybridAnalysis_GetReport v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/HybridAnalysis/HybridAnalysis_GetReport.json)
Fetch Hybrid Analysis reports associated with hashes and filenames.

- **Author:** Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Tieto
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `hash`, `file`, `filename`, `url`, `domain`
